mapper.select:
/* 내가 접수 해야 할 수(생산기술 접수) */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_REQUEST req INNER JOIN ( SELECT tempMapping.REQUEST_NO, MAX(tempMapping.OBJECT_ID) AS OBJECT_ID FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING tempMapping WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY REQUEST_NO ) tempMapping ON tempMapping.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING requestMapping ON requestMapping.REQUEST_NO = tempMapping.REQUEST_NO AND requestMapping.OBJECT_ID = tempMapping.OBJECT_ID JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY deploy ON req.REQUEST_NO = deploy.REQUEST_NO JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL def ON req.REQUEST_NO = def.REQUEST_NO AND def.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' WHERE deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} AND req.REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' /* 생산기술자료 */ AND (deploy.ACCEPT_YN = 'N' OR deploy.ACCEPT_YN IS NULL) AND req.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL'
AND req.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'
/* 로그인 한 사용자가 방산결재권한이 있는지 체크 */ SELECT 0

/* CR 내가 승인해야 할 목록 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITN_CR cr INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMapping ON cr.CR_NO = reqMapping.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMapping.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_USER purchaser ON purchaser.USER_ID = cr.PURCHASER_UID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL currDetail ON currDetail.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO AND currDetail.PROCESS_SEQ = req.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO WHERE currDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND req.STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' AND currDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd}/* 내가 승인해야 할 목록 */
AND req.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* CR 내가 접수해야 할 목록 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITN_CR cr INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMapping ON cr.CR_NO = reqMapping.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMapping.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_USER purchaser ON purchaser.USER_ID = cr.PURCHASER_UID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL currDetail ON currDetail.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO AND currDetail.PROCESS_SEQ = req.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO WHERE currDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' AND cr.PURCHASER_UID = #{sessionUser.userId}/* 내가 접수 해야 할 목록 */
AND req.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* CR 내가 거절한 목록 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITN_CR cr INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMapping ON cr.CR_NO = reqMapping.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMapping.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL detail ON detail.REQUEST_NO = req.REQUEST_NO AND detail.ACTION_CD = 'REJECT' WHERE req.STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' /* 거절된것 */ AND detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 거절 */
AND req.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 내가 승인해야 할 것 - 출력폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyReq INNER JOIN DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL destroyReqDtl ON destroyReqDtl.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyReq.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND destroyReqDtl.PROCESS_SEQ = destroyReq.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO WHERE destroyReqDtl.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND destroyReqDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} AND destroyReq.STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' AND destroyReq.REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRINT'
AND destroyReq.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 출력폐기 반려 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyReq INNER JOIN DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL destroyReqDtl ON destroyReqDtl.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyReq.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND destroyReqDtl.PROCESS_SEQ = destroyReq.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO WHERE destroyReq.STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' AND destroyReqDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} AND destroyReq.REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRINT'
AND destroyReq.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 승인해야 할 내역 수 - 생산기술자료 폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyRequest INNER JOIN DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL detail ON detail.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND detail.PROCESS_SEQ = destroyRequest.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO WHERE destroyRequest.REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' AND detail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND destroyRequest.STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' AND detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd}
AND destroyRequest.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 거절한 내역 수 - 생산기술자료 폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyRequest INNER JOIN DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL detail ON detail.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO = destroyRequest.DESTROY_REQUEST_NO AND detail.PROCESS_SEQ = destroyRequest.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO WHERE destroyRequest.REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRODUCTION' AND detail.ACTION_CD = 'REJECT' AND destroyRequest.STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' AND detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd}
AND destroyRequest.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 구매담당자 - 내가 접수 할 내역 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_REQUEST request INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL accDetail ON accDetail.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO AND accDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' INNER JOIN DOCS_USER insertUser ON insertUser.USER_CD = request.INSERT_USER_CD AND (insertUser.AUTH_SITE = 'E' OR insertUser.DEPT_CD IN (SELECT DEPT_CD FROM DOCS_INSA_DEPT_CD WHERE COLUMN_NM = 'PRODUCT_TEAM_YN') ) WHERE request.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO = '2' /* 현재 상태가 '접수' 인것만 조회 */ AND accDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 지정된 접수자가 로그인한 사용자인 건을 조회 */ AND request.REQUEST_TYPE = 'DISTRIBUTION' /* 요청 유형이 배포, 생산기술자료인 것만 조회. 배포요청인 경우 도면,문서,SW,생기 모두 DISTRIBUTION임 */ AND request.STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST'
AND request.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* CR 거절된 목록 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITN_CR cr INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMapping ON cr.CR_NO = reqMapping.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMapping.REQUEST_NO WHERE req.STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' /* 거절된것 */ AND req.INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 요청 */
AND req.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 거절 된 내역 - 출력폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyReq WHERE STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' AND INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 요청 */ AND REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRINT'
AND INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 거절된 내역 수 - 생산기술자료 폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyRequest WHERE REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRODUCTION' AND STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' AND INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 요청 */
AND INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 승인된 수 - 생산기술자료 폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyRequest WHERE REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRODUCTION' AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 요청 */
AND destroyRequest.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 승인 된 수 - 출력폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyReq WHERE INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRINT'
AND destroyReq.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 요청한 수 - 출력폐기 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST destroyReq WHERE INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 요청 */ AND REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRINT'
AND destroyReq.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* CR - 특정 상태 count */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITN_CR cr INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMapping ON cr.CR_NO = reqMapping.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST req ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqMapping.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_USER requestUser ON requestUser.USER_ID = cr.VENDOR_UID WHERE req.STATUS_CD = #{statusCd} AND requestUser.USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} /* 내가 요청. 정확히는 요청자로 지정된 사람. */
AND req.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

/* 내가 승인해야 할 내역 수 */ SELECT count(*) FROM DOCS_REQUEST request INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL currDetail ON currDetail.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO AND currDetail.PROCESS_SEQ = request.CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqDetail ON reqDetail.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO AND reqDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' INNER JOIN DOCS_USER reqUser ON reqUser.USER_CD = reqDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD WHERE currDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND request.STATUS_CD NOT IN ('APPROVAL', 'REJECT') /* 최종승인 아닌데이터만 */ AND currDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd}/* 내가 승인해야 할 목록 */ AND request.REQUEST_TYPE = #{requestType} AND request.BUSINESS_AREA_CD = #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd}
AND request.INSERT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(USE_END_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, /* 유효기간(출력, 폐기기한) */ OBJECT_TYPE AS objectType, /* 자료유형 */ FN_GET_CD_NM('objectTypeWithP', OBJECT_TYPE, 'sessionLang') AS objectTypeNm, /* 자료유형명 */ info.OBJECT_NO AS objectNo, /* 자료번호 */ FN_GET_CD_NM('', OBJECT_TYPE, 'sessionLang') AS objectTypeNm, /* 자료유형명 */ TO_CHAR(request.INSERT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS requestDt, /* 요청일 */ CASE WHEN DEPLOY_NORMAL_YN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG lang WHERE lang.LANG_CD = 'combo.deployType.normalArea' AND lang.LANG_TYPE = 'sessionLang') WHEN DEPLOY_SPECIAL_YN = 'Y' THEN (SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG lang WHERE lang.LANG_CD = 'combo.deployType.specialArea' AND lang.LANG_TYPE = 'sessionLang') ELSE (SELECT LANG_DESC FROM DOCS_LANG lang WHERE lang.LANG_CD = 'combo.deployType.viewing' AND lang.LANG_TYPE = 'sessionLang') END AS deployTypeNm /* 배포방식 */ FROM DOCS_REQUEST request INNER JOIN ( SELECT tempMapping.REQUEST_NO, MAX(tempMapping.OBJECT_ID) AS OBJECT_ID FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING tempMapping GROUP BY tempMapping.REQUEST_NO ) requestMapping ON requestMapping.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING info ON info.OBJECT_ID = requestMapping.OBJECT_ID AND info.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO WHERE STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' /* 승인이 된것 중 */ AND REQUEST_TYPE = 'requestType'
-- 출력폐기기한은 내부 사용자용 AND (CASE WHEN 'requestType' = 'PRINT' THEN request.INSERT_USER_CD = 'sessionUser.userCd' ELSE TRUE END)
-- 배포폐기기한은 외부 사용자용 AND (CASE WHEN 'requestType' = 'DISTRIBUTION' THEN request.DEPLOY_COMPANY_CD = 'sessionUser.companyCd' ELSE TRUE END)
AND request.USE_END_YMD >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 DAY' * (SELECT SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE::int FROM DOCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG t WHERE t.SYSTEM_CONFIG_GROUP = 'SYSTEM_CONFIG' AND t.SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'VALID_TERM'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND request.USE_END_YMD <= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY INSERT_DT DESC;

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DESTROY_TODO_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, /* 유효기간(출력, 폐기기한) */ OBJECT_TYPE AS objectType, /* 자료유형 */ FN_GET_CD_NM('objectTypeWithP', OBJECT_TYPE, 'ko') AS objectTypeNm, /* 자료유형명 */ info.OBJECT_NO AS objectNo /* 자료번호 */ FROM DOCS_REQUEST request INNER JOIN ( SELECT tempMapping.REQUEST_NO, MAX(tempMapping.OBJECT_ID) AS OBJECT_ID FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING tempMapping GROUP BY tempMapping.REQUEST_NO ) requestMapping ON requestMapping.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING info ON info.OBJECT_ID = requestMapping.OBJECT_ID AND info.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO WHERE REQUEST_TYPE = 'PRINT' AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' /* 승인이 된것 중 */ AND request.INSERT_USER_CD = 'USER_0000000001' /* 내가 요청 */ AND request.DESTROY_TODO_YMD >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 DAY' * (SELECT SYSTEM_CONFIG_VALUE::int FROM DOCS_SYSTEM_CONFIG t WHERE t.SYSTEM_CONFIG_GROUP = 'SYSTEM_CONFIG' AND t.SYSTEM_CONFIG_CD = 'VALID_TERM'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND request.DESTROY_TODO_YMD <= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY DESTROY_TODO_YMD DESC;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(info.insert_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, 'FC' AS objectType, 'Documents' AS objectTypeNm, COALESCE(info.drawing_no, '-') AS objectNo, info.insert_dt AS sortDt FROM docs_drawing info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(info.status, '') IN ('승인진행중', 'APPROVAL') AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approver, ''), ' ', ''), ',') ap(token) WHERE ( ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = ap.token ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.revieweruser, ''), ' ', ''), ',') rv(token) WHERE ( rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = rv.token ) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(info.insert_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, 'IOC' AS objectType, 'IOC' AS objectTypeNm, COALESCE(info.document_no, '-') AS objectNo, info.insert_dt AS sortDt FROM docs_document info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(info.status, '') IN ('승인진행중', 'APPROVAL') AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approver, ''), ' ', ''), ',') ap(token) WHERE ( ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = ap.token ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.revieweruser, ''), ' ', ''), ',') rv(token) WHERE ( rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = rv.token ) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(info.insert_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, 'CCB' AS objectType, 'CCB' AS objectTypeNm, COALESCE(info.sw_no, '-') AS objectNo, info.insert_dt AS sortDt FROM docs_sw info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(info.status, '') IN ('승인진행중', 'APPROVAL') AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approver, ''), ' ', ''), ',') ap(token) WHERE ( ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = ap.token ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.revieweruser, ''), ' ', ''), ',') rv(token) WHERE ( rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = rv.token ) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(info.insert_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, 'MRB' AS objectType, 'MRB' AS objectTypeNm, COALESCE(info.document_no, '-') AS objectNo, info.insert_dt AS sortDt FROM docs_product_document info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(info.status, '') IN ('승인진행중', 'APPROVAL') AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approver, ''), ' ', ''), ',') ap(token) WHERE ( ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = ap.token ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.revieweruser, ''), ' ', ''), ',') rv(token) WHERE ( rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = rv.token ) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT TO_CHAR(info.insert_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, 'PMPCB' AS objectType, 'PMPCB' AS objectTypeNm, COALESCE(info.document_no, '-') AS objectNo, info.insert_dt AS sortDt FROM docs_dxf_document info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(info.status, '') IN ('승인진행중', 'APPROVAL') AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approver, ''), ' ', ''), ',') ap(token) WHERE ( ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = ap.token ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.revieweruser, ''), ' ', ''), ',') rv(token) WHERE ( rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR rv.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR rv.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approved_users, info.status, ''), ' ', ''), ',') au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = rv.token ) ) ) ) t ORDER BY t.sortDt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(info.insert_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, 'PEERREVIEW' AS objectType, 'PeerReview' AS objectTypeNm, COALESCE(info.peerreview_no, '-') AS objectNo, info.insert_dt AS sortDt FROM docs_peerreview info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(info.status, '') IN ('승인진행중', 'APPROVAL') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(REPLACE(COALESCE(info.approver, ''), ' ', ''), ',') ap(token) WHERE ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' OR ap.token = REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') OR ap.token LIKE REPLACE(COALESCE(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), ' ', '') || '|%' ) ) t ORDER BY t.sortDt DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT session_time FROM session_config WHERE id = 1
